financial.coolingOffHelp: Consumer protection period after disbursement during which the customer can cancel. Set to 0 to disable.

validation.missingTemplates: Recommended notification templates missing for: {{events}}. These help ensure customers are informed about key loan events.

factoring.title: Invoice Factoring Configuration
factoring.description: Configure advance rates, recourse, verification, and concentration limits for invoice factoring.
factoring.advanceRateRangeHelp: Allowed minimum, maximum, and default advance rate (% of invoice face value).
factoring.discountRateHelp: Annual discount rate applied pro-rata to the invoice tenor.
factoring.defaultRecourseTypeHelp: How defaults are handled by default for invoices funded under this product.

recourse.withRecourse: With Recourse — collect from seller on default
recourse.withoutRecourse: Without Recourse — lender absorbs default loss

factoring.offerValidityHelp: How long a generated factoring offer remains acceptable. Stale offers are auto-cancelled by the hourly scheduler.
factoring.nonRecourseEligibilityHelp: Thresholds an invoice must meet for non-recourse funding.
factoring.verificationRulesHelp: When invoices auto-verify vs. require manual operator review.
factoring.manualVerifyNewSeller: Require manual verification for new sellers
factoring.manualVerifyNewDebtor: Require manual verification for new debtors
factoring.concentrationLimitsHelp: Caps that prevent over-concentration of exposure to any one debtor or industry.
factoring.agingThresholdsHelp: Day-count thresholds that drive aging classification and recourse triggers. Must be ascending.
factoring.reserveReleaseAuto: Release reserve automatically on payment confirmation
factoring.reserveManualReleaseAboveHelp: Invoices above this face value require operator approval to release the reserve. Leave blank to disable.

validation.defaultOutsideRange: Default advance rate must be between minimum and maximum.
validation.agingMustAscend: Aging thresholds must be strictly ascending (grace < overdue < seriously overdue ≤ default).
